name: player career year combined with other columns
description: Test case for career year column combined with other player data
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", "player"."current_nfl_team" AS "current_nfl_team_0", t209f3a217d72274fbedbe4d44e4a5095.career_year as career_year_0, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" as "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed" on "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."year" = 2025 and "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "player_seasonlogs" as "t209f3a217d72274fbedbe4d44e4a5095" on "t209f3a217d72274fbedbe4d44e4a5095"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t209f3a217d72274fbedbe4d44e4a5095"."year" = 2023 and "t209f3a217d72274fbedbe4d44e4a5095"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" on "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('RB') and t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed.career_year <= '3' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", "player"."current_nfl_team", t209f3a217d72274fbedbe4d44e4a5095.career_year, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 7 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 15
